name: legacy-spec-agent
description: Reverse-engineer a citation-grounded spec from undocumented legacy code and track drift with a bundled MCP connector.

interface.shortDescription: Reconstruct citation-grounded specs from legacy code.
interface.longDescription: Generate verified specs, architecture notes, interfaces, data models, drift reports, charts, and a report from undocumented code using Codex plus the bundled deterministic MCP connector.
defaultPrompt: Use Legacy Spec Agent to document this repo.
Check this spec for drift against the code.
